import { useState, useCallback, useRef, useEffect } from “react”;

// === IMAGE DATA ===
const IMG = {
ssr_wink: “data:image/jpeg;base64,”,
ssr_robot_blue: “data:image/jpeg;base64,”,
ssr_robot_gold: “data:image/jpeg;base64,”,
secret_gold: “data:image/jpeg;base64,”,
n_octo_orange: “data:image/jpeg;base64,”,
n_fox2: “data:image/jpeg;base64,”,
r_cat: “data:image/jpeg;base64,”,
n_rabbit: “data:image/jpeg;base64,”,
n_octo_red: “data:image/jpeg;base64,”,
n_fox1: “data:image/jpeg;base64,”,
};

// === GAME DATA ===
const RARITIES = {
SECRET:{label:“SECRET”,color:”#FF1744”,glow:“rgba(255,23,68,0.9)”,bg:“linear-gradient(135deg,#FF1744,#FFD700,#FF1744)”,prob:1,desc:”\u795e\u5f15\u304d”},
SSR:{label:“SSR”,color:”#FFD700”,glow:“rgba(255,215,0,0.8)”,bg:“linear-gradient(135deg,#FFD700,#FF6D00,#FFD700)”,prob:3,desc:”\u6fc0\u30ec\u30a2”},
R:{label:“R”,color:”#00E5FF”,glow:“rgba(0,229,255,0.6)”,bg:“linear-gradient(135deg,#00E5FF,#1565C0,#00E5FF)”,prob:15,desc:”\u30ec\u30a2”},
N:{label:“N”,color:”#90A4AE”,glow:“rgba(144,164,174,0.4)”,bg:“linear-gradient(135deg,#78909C,#455A64,#78909C)”,prob:81,desc:”\u30ce\u30fc\u30de\u30eb”},
};
const ALL_CARDS = {
SECRET:[{id:“s1”,name:“GOLD QUEEN”,image:IMG.secret_gold,reward:“1,000,000 MICRO”}],
SSR:[
{id:“ssr1”,name:“CYBER IDOL”,image:IMG.ssr_wink,reward:“100,000 MICRO”},
{id:“ssr2”,name:“MECHA BLUE”,image:IMG.ssr_robot_blue,reward:“100,000 MICRO”},
{id:“ssr3”,name:“MECHA NOVA”,image:IMG.ssr_robot_gold,reward:“100,000 MICRO”},
],
R:[{id:“r1”,name:“SHADOW CAT”,image:IMG.r_cat,reward:“10,000 MICRO”}],
N:[
{id:“n1”,name:“CYBER RABBIT”,image:IMG.n_rabbit,reward:“100 MICRO”},
{id:“n2”,name:“OCTO RED”,image:IMG.n_octo_red,reward:“100 MICRO”},
{id:“n3”,name:“OCTO ORANGE”,image:IMG.n_octo_orange,reward:“100 MICRO”},
{id:“n4”,name:“BLAZE FOX”,image:IMG.n_fox1,reward:“1,000 MICRO”},
{id:“n5”,name:“STORM FOX”,image:IMG.n_fox2,reward:“100 MICRO”},
],
};
const PITY_CEILING = 50;
function getRarity(pity){
if(pity>=PITY_CEILING) return “SSR”;
const r=Math.random()*100;let c=0;
for(const[k,v] of Object.entries(RARITIES)){c+=v.prob;if(r<c)return k;}
return “N”;
}

// === SOUND ===
function playSound(type){
try{
const ac=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();
const g=ac.createGain();g.connect(ac.destination);
if(type===“click”){
const o=ac.createOscillator();o.type=“sine”;o.frequency.setValueAtTime(800,ac.currentTime);
o.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(1200,ac.currentTime+0.1);
g.gain.setValueAtTime(0.15,ac.currentTime);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001,ac.currentTime+0.15);
o.connect(g);o.start();o.stop(ac.currentTime+0.15);
} else if(type===“reveal_n”){
const o=ac.createOscillator();o.type=“triangle”;o.frequency.setValueAtTime(400,ac.currentTime);
o.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(600,ac.currentTime+0.3);
g.gain.setValueAtTime(0.1,ac.currentTime);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001,ac.currentTime+0.4);
o.connect(g);o.start();o.stop(ac.currentTime+0.4);
} else if(type===“reveal_r”){
[600,800,1000].forEach((f,i)=>{
const o=ac.createOscillator();o.type=“sine”;o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f,ac.currentTime+i*0.12);
const gg=ac.createGain();gg.gain.setValueAtTime(0.12,ac.currentTime+i*0.12);gg.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001,ac.currentTime+i*0.12+0.2);
o.connect(gg);gg.connect(ac.destination);o.start(ac.currentTime+i*0.12);o.stop(ac.currentTime+i*0.12+0.2);
});
} else if(type===“reveal_ssr”){
[523,659,784,1047].forEach((f,i)=>{
const o=ac.createOscillator();o.type=“sine”;o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f,ac.currentTime+i*0.15);
const gg=ac.createGain();gg.gain.setValueAtTime(0.15,ac.currentTime+i*0.15);gg.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001,ac.currentTime+i*0.15+0.3);
o.connect(gg);gg.connect(ac.destination);o.start(ac.currentTime+i*0.15);o.stop(ac.currentTime+i*0.15+0.3);
});
} else if(type===“crack”){
const buf=ac.createBuffer(1,ac.sampleRate*0.3,ac.sampleRate);
const d=buf.getChannelData(0);for(let i=0;i<d.length;i++)d[i]=(Math.random()*2-1)*Math.exp(-i/(ac.sampleRate*0.05));
const s=ac.createBufferSource();s.buffer=buf;g.gain.setValueAtTime(0.4,ac.currentTime);
s.connect(g);s.start();
} else if(type===“blackout”){
const o=ac.createOscillator();o.type=“sawtooth”;o.frequency.setValueAtTime(150,ac.currentTime);
o.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(40,ac.currentTime+1);
g.gain.setValueAtTime(0.12,ac.currentTime);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001,ac.currentTime+1.2);
o.connect(g);o.start();o.stop(ac.currentTime+1.2);
}
}catch(e){}
}

// === SHARE IMAGE ===
async function generateShareImage(result, rarity){
const canvas=document.createElement(“canvas”);
canvas.width=600;canvas.height=800;
const ctx=canvas.getContext(“2d”);
// BG gradient
const grad=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,600,800);
grad.addColorStop(0,”#0a0010”);grad.addColorStop(0.5,”#120025”);grad.addColorStop(1,”#050010”);
ctx.fillStyle=grad;ctx.fillRect(0,0,600,800);
// Grid lines
ctx.strokeStyle=“rgba(224,64,251,0.06)”;ctx.lineWidth=0.5;
for(let i=0;i<600;i+=30){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(i,0);ctx.lineTo(i,800);ctx.stroke();}
for(let i=0;i<800;i+=30){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,i);ctx.lineTo(600,i);ctx.stroke();}
// Title
ctx.font=“bold 36px ‘Arial Black’,sans-serif”;ctx.textAlign=“center”;
ctx.fillStyle=rarity.color;ctx.shadowColor=rarity.glow;ctx.shadowBlur=20;
ctx.fillText(”$MICRO GACHA”,300,50);
ctx.shadowBlur=0;
// Rarity badge
ctx.font=“bold 28px ‘Arial Black’,sans-serif”;
ctx.fillStyle=rarity.color;ctx.shadowColor=rarity.glow;ctx.shadowBlur=15;
ctx.fillText(rarity.label+” - “+rarity.desc,300,90);
ctx.shadowBlur=0;
// Card image
return new Promise(resolve=>{
const img=new Image();
img.crossOrigin=“anonymous”;
img.onload=()=>{
const cw=380,ch=cw*(img.height/img.width);
const cx=(600-cw)/2,cy=110;
// Card glow
ctx.shadowColor=rarity.glow;ctx.shadowBlur=40;
ctx.fillStyle=rarity.color;
ctx.fillRect(cx-4,cy-4,cw+8,ch+8);
ctx.shadowBlur=0;
ctx.drawImage(img,cx,cy,cw,ch);
// Card border
ctx.strokeStyle=rarity.color;ctx.lineWidth=3;
ctx.strokeRect(cx-2,cy-2,cw+4,ch+4);
// Card name
const ny=cy+ch+40;
ctx.font=“bold 24px ‘Arial Black’,sans-serif”;ctx.fillStyle=”#fff”;
ctx.fillText(result.card.name,300,ny);
// Reward
ctx.font=“bold 20px ‘Arial’,sans-serif”;ctx.fillStyle=rarity.color;
ctx.fillText(”\ud83c\udf81 “+result.card.reward,300,ny+35);
// Footer
ctx.font=“14px ‘Arial’,sans-serif”;ctx.fillStyle=”#546E7A”;
ctx.fillText(”#MICRO #MICRO\u30ac\u30c1\u30e3 #memecoin”,300,ny+75);
ctx.fillText(“micro-gacha.io”,300,ny+95);
canvas.toBlob(blob=>resolve(blob),“image/png”);
};
img.src=result.card.image;
});
}

async function shareToX(result,rarity){
try{
const blob=await generateShareImage(result,rarity);
const file=new File([blob],“micro-gacha-result.png”,{type:“image/png”});
if(navigator.canShare&&navigator.canShare({files:[file]})){
await navigator.share({text:”$MICRO\u30ac\u30c1\u30e3\u3067\u3010”+rarity.label+”\u3011”+result.card.name+”\u3092\u5f15\u3044\u305f\uff01\n\u5831\u916c: “+result.card.reward+”\n\n#MICRO #MICRO\u30ac\u30c1\u30e3”,files:[file]});
return;
}
}catch(e){}
// Fallback: download image + open twitter
try{
const blob=await generateShareImage(result,rarity);
const url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);const a=document.createElement(“a”);
a.href=url;a.download=“micro-gacha-result.png”;a.click();URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
}catch(e){}
const t=encodeURIComponent(”$MICRO\u30ac\u30c1\u30e3\u7d50\u679c\n\n\u3010”+rarity.label+”\u3011”+result.card.name+”\n\u5831\u916c: “+result.card.reward+”\n\n#MICRO #MICRO\u30ac\u30c1\u30e3 #memecoin”);
window.open(“https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=”+t,”_blank”);
}

// === PARTICLES ===
function Particles({color,count=40,active}){
if(!active)return null;
return(
<div style={{position:“absolute”,inset:0,pointerEvents:“none”,overflow:“hidden”,zIndex:50}}>
{Array.from({length:count}).map((_,i)=>{
const angle=(360/count)*i,dist=120+Math.random()*280,size=3+Math.random()*10,delay=Math.random()*0.5;
const dx=Math.cos(angle*Math.PI/180)*dist,dy=Math.sin(angle*Math.PI/180)*dist;
return <div key={i} style={{position:“absolute”,left:“50%”,top:“50%”,width:size,height:size,
borderRadius:“50%”,background:color,boxShadow:“0 0 “+size*3+“px “+color,
animation:“pb 1.5s “+delay+“s ease-out forwards”,transform:“translate(-50%,-50%)”,opacity:0,
“–dx”:dx,”–dy”:dy,
}}/>;
})}
</div>
);
}

// === 3D CARD ===
function Card3D({children,rarity,active}){
const ref=useRef(null);
const[tilt,setTilt]=useState({x:0,y:0});
const handleMove=useCallback(e=>{
if(!ref.current||!active)return;
const rect=ref.current.getBoundingClientRect();
const x=((e.clientX??e.touches?.[0]?.clientX??0)-rect.left)/rect.width;
const y=((e.clientY??e.touches?.[0]?.clientY??0)-rect.top)/rect.height;
setTilt({x:(y-0.5)*-20,y:(x-0.5)*20});
},[active]);
const handleLeave=()=>setTilt({x:0,y:0});
const r=RARITIES[rarity];
return(
<div ref={ref} onMouseMove={handleMove} onTouchMove={handleMove} onMouseLeave={handleLeave} onTouchEnd={handleLeave}
style={{
“–gc”:r.glow, width:240,maxWidth:“85vw”,borderRadius:16,margin:“0 auto”,
transform:“perspective(600px) rotateX(”+tilt.x+“deg) rotateY(”+tilt.y+“deg)”,
transition:“transform 0.1s ease-out”,transformStyle:“preserve-3d”,
animation:“cardReveal 1.5s ease-out”+(rarity===“SECRET”?”, secretBorder 1s linear infinite”:rarity===“SSR”?”, pulseGlow 2s infinite”:””),
boxShadow:“0 0 40px “+r.glow+”,0 25px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6)”,
position:“relative”,overflow:“hidden”,border:“3px solid “+r.color,
}}>
{(rarity===“SECRET”||rarity===“SSR”)&&(
<div style={{position:“absolute”,inset:0,zIndex:3,pointerEvents:“none”,
background:“linear-gradient(”+((tilt.y+10)*8+105)+“deg,transparent 15%,rgba(255,255,255,0.25) 40%,rgba(255,255,255,0.4) 50%,rgba(255,255,255,0.25) 60%,transparent 85%)”,
backgroundSize:“200% 100%”,animation:“holoShine 2s linear infinite”,mixBlendMode:“overlay”,
}}/>
)}
{rarity===“SECRET”&&(
<div style={{position:“absolute”,inset:0,zIndex:2,pointerEvents:“none”,
background:“conic-gradient(from “+(tilt.y*10)+“deg,rgba(255,0,0,0.1),rgba(255,215,0,0.1),rgba(0,255,0,0.1),rgba(0,229,255,0.1),rgba(224,64,251,0.1),rgba(255,0,0,0.1))”,
mixBlendMode:“screen”,
}}/>
)}
{children}
</div>
);
}

// === GLASS BOX ===
const Glass=({children,style,…p})=>(

  <div style={{background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)",backdropFilter:"blur(12px)",WebkitBackdropFilter:"blur(12px)",
    border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)",borderRadius:16,...style}} {...p}>{children}</div>
);

// === MAIN ===
export default function MicroGacha(){
const[phase,setPhase]=useState(“idle”);
const[result,setResult]=useState(null);
const[fx,setFx]=useState({crack:false,flash:false,black:false});
const[history,setHistory]=useState([]);
const[collection,setCollection]=useState({});
const[wallet,setWallet]=useState(false);
const[balance,setBalance]=useState(50000);
const[pity,setPity]=useState(0);
const[tab,setTab]=useState(“gacha”); // gacha | collection
const[totalBurn,setTotalBurn]=useState(0);
const COST=1000;

const doGacha=useCallback(()=>{
if(phase!==“idle”||balance<COST)return;
playSound(“click”);
setBalance(b=>b-COST);
setTotalBurn(b=>b+COST);
setResult(null);
setFx({crack:false,flash:false,black:false});
setPhase(“shaking”);

```
setTimeout(()=>{
  const rarity=getRarity(pity);
  if(rarity==="SSR"||rarity==="SECRET")setPity(0);else setPity(p=>p+1);
  const cards=ALL_CARDS[rarity];
  const card=cards[Math.floor(Math.random()*cards.length)];
  const res={rarity,card};

  if(rarity==="SECRET"||rarity==="SSR"){
    setPhase("blackout");
    setFx(e=>({...e,black:true}));
    playSound("blackout");
    setTimeout(()=>{
      if(rarity==="SECRET"){
        playSound("crack");
        setFx(e=>({...e,flash:true,crack:true}));
        setTimeout(()=>setFx(e=>({...e,crack:false})),3000);
      } else {
        setFx(e=>({...e,flash:true}));
      }
      setTimeout(()=>{
        setFx({crack:false,flash:false,black:false});
        setResult(res);setPhase("revealing");
        playSound("reveal_ssr");
        setTimeout(()=>{setPhase("result");setHistory(h=>[res,...h].slice(0,30));setCollection(c=>({...c,[card.id]:true}));},1800);
      },rarity==="SECRET"?2200:1400);
    },1600);
  } else if(rarity==="R"){
    setPhase("opening");
    setTimeout(()=>{setResult(res);setPhase("revealing");playSound("reveal_r");
      setTimeout(()=>{setPhase("result");setHistory(h=>[res,...h].slice(0,30));setCollection(c=>({...c,[card.id]:true}));},1200);
    },800);
  } else {
    setPhase("opening");
    setTimeout(()=>{setResult(res);setPhase("revealing");playSound("reveal_n");
      setTimeout(()=>{setPhase("result");setHistory(h=>[res,...h].slice(0,30));setCollection(c=>({...c,[card.id]:true}));},1000);
    },600);
  }
},2200);
```

},[phase,balance,pity]);

const rr=result?RARITIES[result.rarity]:null;
const allCards=Object.entries(ALL_CARDS).flatMap(([r,cs])=>cs.map(c=>({…c,rarity:r})));
const collected=Object.keys(collection).length;

return(
<>
<style>{`@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Orbitron:wght@400;700;900&family=Zen+Kaku+Gothic+New:wght@400;700;900&family=Righteous&display=swap'); *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;} ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(224,64,251,0.2);border-radius:2px} @keyframes pb{0%{opacity:1;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) translateX(0px) translateY(0px)}100%{opacity:0;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) translateX(calc(var(--dx)*1px)) translateY(calc(var(--dy)*1px))}} @keyframes shakeHard{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0) rotate(0)}10%{transform:translate(-16px,8px) rotate(-6deg)}20%{transform:translate(16px,-8px) rotate(6deg)}30%{transform:translate(-24px,12px) rotate(-9deg)}40%{transform:translate(24px,-12px) rotate(9deg)}50%{transform:translate(-28px,14px) rotate(-10deg)}60%{transform:translate(28px,-14px) rotate(10deg)}70%{transform:translate(-18px,6px) rotate(-5deg)}80%{transform:translate(18px,-6px) rotate(5deg)}90%{transform:translate(-8px,3px) rotate(-2deg)}} @keyframes packExplode{0%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1}40%{transform:scale(1.5)}100%{transform:scale(3.5);opacity:0;filter:brightness(5)}} @keyframes cardReveal{0%{transform:perspective(600px) rotateY(180deg) scale(0.1);opacity:0}35%{transform:perspective(600px) rotateY(90deg) scale(0.6);opacity:0.4}65%{transform:perspective(600px) rotateY(15deg) scale(1.1);opacity:1}85%{transform:perspective(600px) rotateY(-5deg) scale(0.97)}100%{transform:perspective(600px) rotateY(0) scale(1);opacity:1}} @keyframes flashBang{0%{opacity:1}100%{opacity:0}} @keyframes crackDraw{0%{stroke-dasharray:0 3000;opacity:1}60%{opacity:1}100%{stroke-dasharray:3000 0;opacity:0}} @keyframes floatUp{0%{transform:translateY(30px);opacity:0}100%{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}} @keyframes pulseGlow{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 25px var(--gc),0 0 50px var(--gc)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 60px var(--gc),0 0 120px var(--gc),0 0 180px var(--gc)}} @keyframes rainbow{0%{filter:hue-rotate(0)}100%{filter:hue-rotate(360deg)}} @keyframes bgPulse{0%,100%{opacity:0.3}50%{opacity:0.8}} @keyframes spinShine{0%{transform:rotate(0)}100%{transform:rotate(360deg)}} @keyframes holoShine{0%{background-position:-200% 0}100%{background-position:200% 0}} @keyframes slideDown{0%{transform:translateY(-20px);opacity:0}100%{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}} @keyframes bounceIn{0%{transform:scale(0)}60%{transform:scale(1.3)}80%{transform:scale(0.9)}100%{transform:scale(1)}} @keyframes blackoutIn{0%{opacity:0}100%{opacity:1}} @keyframes textGlitch{0%,100%{opacity:1}20%{opacity:0.2;transform:translateX(-4px)}40%{opacity:0.7;transform:translateX(4px)}60%{opacity:0.1;transform:translateX(-3px)}80%{opacity:0.8;transform:translateX(2px)}} @keyframes secretBorder{0%{border-color:#FF1744;box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(255,23,68,0.5)}25%{border-color:#FFD700;box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(255,215,0,0.5)}50%{border-color:#00E5FF;box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(0,229,255,0.5)}75%{border-color:#E040FB;box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(224,64,251,0.5)}100%{border-color:#FF1744;box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(255,23,68,0.5)}} @keyframes floatBg{0%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%}} @keyframes glow{0%,100%{opacity:0.5}50%{opacity:1}} @keyframes packFloat{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px)}}`}</style>

```
  {fx.crack&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,zIndex:99999,pointerEvents:"none"}}>
    <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:0,background:"#fff",animation:"flashBang 0.6s ease-out forwards"}}/>
    <svg width="100%" height="100%" style={{position:"absolute"}}>
      {[[50,50,8,0],[50,50,92,3],[50,50,0,40],[50,50,100,50],[50,50,12,98],[50,50,88,95],[50,50,0,20],[50,50,100,25],[50,50,30,0],[50,50,70,100],[50,50,5,65],[50,50,95,70],[50,50,40,100],[50,50,60,0]].map(([x1,y1,x2,y2],i)=>(
        <line key={i} x1={x1+"%"} y1={y1+"%"} x2={x2+"%"} y2={y2+"%"} stroke="rgba(255,23,68,0.95)" strokeWidth={2+Math.random()*4}
          style={{animation:"crackDraw 0.6s "+(0.02+i*0.03)+"s ease-out both"}}/>
      ))}
    </svg>
  </div>}
  {fx.flash&&!fx.crack&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,zIndex:9998,pointerEvents:"none",background:"rgba(255,215,0,0.8)",animation:"flashBang 0.8s ease-out forwards"}}/>}
  {fx.black&&!fx.flash&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,zIndex:9997,pointerEvents:"none",background:"#000",animation:"blackoutIn 0.5s ease-out forwards",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>
    <div style={{color:"#fff",fontFamily:"'Orbitron',monospace",fontSize:16,letterSpacing:8,animation:"textGlitch 0.25s infinite"}}>. . .</div>
  </div>}

  <div style={{minHeight:"100vh",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#06000d 0%,#0d0020 25%,#10002a 50%,#08001a 75%,#040010 100%)",
    backgroundSize:"400% 400%",animation:"floatBg 20s ease infinite",fontFamily:"'Zen Kaku Gothic New',sans-serif",color:"#fff",position:"relative",overflow:"hidden",
  }}>
    {/* Ambient orbs */}
    <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,pointerEvents:"none",zIndex:0,overflow:"hidden"}}>
      <div style={{position:"absolute",width:300,height:300,borderRadius:"50%",background:"radial-gradient(circle,rgba(224,64,251,0.08),transparent 70%)",top:"-10%",left:"-10%",animation:"floatBg 8s ease infinite"}}/>
      <div style={{position:"absolute",width:250,height:250,borderRadius:"50%",background:"radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,229,255,0.06),transparent 70%)",bottom:"10%",right:"-5%",animation:"floatBg 12s ease infinite"}}/>
      <div style={{position:"absolute",width:200,height:200,borderRadius:"50%",background:"radial-gradient(circle,rgba(255,23,68,0.04),transparent 70%)",top:"40%",left:"60%",animation:"floatBg 10s ease infinite"}}/>
    </div>

    {/* Header */}
    <div style={{position:"relative",zIndex:10,padding:"16px 16px 0",maxWidth:460,margin:"0 auto"}}>
      <Glass style={{padding:"16px 20px",borderRadius:20,border:"1px solid rgba(224,64,251,0.1)"}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
          <div>
            <h1 style={{fontFamily:"'Righteous',cursive",fontSize:26,
              background:"linear-gradient(90deg,#FF1744,#E040FB,#00E5FF,#FFD700,#FF1744)",
              backgroundSize:"200% 100%",animation:"floatBg 3s linear infinite",
              WebkitBackgroundClip:"text",WebkitTextFillColor:"transparent",letterSpacing:2,
            }}>$MICRO GACHA</h1>
          </div>
          <button onClick={()=>setWallet(!wallet)} style={{
            padding:"8px 18px",borderRadius:20,
            border:wallet?"2px solid #00E676":"2px solid rgba(224,64,251,0.25)",
            background:wallet?"rgba(0,230,118,0.08)":"rgba(224,64,251,0.04)",
            color:wallet?"#00E676":"#E040FB",fontFamily:"'Orbitron',monospace",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,
            cursor:"pointer",letterSpacing:1,transition:"all 0.3s",
          }}>{wallet?"\u25cf CONNECTED":"CONNECT"}</button>
        </div>
        {wallet&&(
          <div style={{marginTop:12,display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"space-between"}}>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#78909C",marginBottom:2}}>BALANCE</div>
              <div style={{fontFamily:"'Orbitron',monospace",fontSize:18,fontWeight:900,
                background:"linear-gradient(90deg,#00E5FF,#E040FB)",WebkitBackgroundClip:"text",WebkitTextFillColor:"transparent",
              }}>{balance.toLocaleString()}</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{width:1,height:30,background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"}}/>
            <div style={{textAlign:"center"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#78909C",marginBottom:2}}>PITY</div>
              <div style={{fontFamily:"'Orbitron',monospace",fontSize:16,fontWeight:900,color:pity>=40?"#FF1744":pity>=25?"#FFD700":"#546E7A"}}>{pity}/{PITY_CEILING}</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{width:1,height:30,background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"}}/>
            <div style={{textAlign:"center"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#78909C",marginBottom:2}}>COLLECTED</div>
              <div style={{fontFamily:"'Orbitron',monospace",fontSize:16,fontWeight:900,color:"#E040FB"}}>{collected}/{allCards.length}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </Glass>

      {/* Tabs */}
      {wallet&&(
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,marginTop:10,justifyContent:"center"}}>
          {["gacha","collection"].map(t=>(
            <button key={t} onClick={()=>{if(phase==="idle")setTab(t)}} style={{
              padding:"6px 20px",borderRadius:20,fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer",
              border:tab===t?"2px solid #E040FB":"2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)",
              background:tab===t?"rgba(224,64,251,0.12)":"rgba(255,255,255,0.02)",
              color:tab===t?"#E040FB":"#546E7A",fontFamily:"'Orbitron',monospace",letterSpacing:1,transition:"all 0.3s",
            }}>{t==="gacha"?"GACHA":"COLLECTION"}</button>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Rates */}
      {wallet&&tab==="gacha"&&phase==="idle"&&!result&&(
        <div style={{marginTop:8,display:"flex",gap:4,justifyContent:"center",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
          {Object.entries(RARITIES).map(([k,v])=>(
            <div key={k} style={{padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:12,fontSize:9,
              background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.02)",border:"1px solid "+v.color+"20",
            }}>
              <span style={{color:v.color,fontWeight:900,fontFamily:"'Orbitron',monospace"}}>{k}</span>
              <span style={{color:"#455A64",marginLeft:3}}>{v.prob}%</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>

    {/* Main content */}
    <div style={{position:"relative",zIndex:10,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
      minHeight:wallet?"calc(100vh - 220px)":"calc(100vh - 80px)",padding:16,
    }}>
      {!wallet?(
        <div style={{textAlign:"center",animation:"floatUp 0.8s ease-out"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:56,marginBottom:16,animation:"bounceIn 0.8s ease-out"}}>{"\ud83c\udfb0"}</div>
          <p style={{color:"#E040FB",fontSize:18,fontWeight:700}}>{"\u30a6\u30a9\u30ec\u30c3\u30c8\u3092\u63a5\u7d9a\u3057\u3066\u30ac\u30c1\u30e3\u3092\u56de\u305d\u3046\uff01"}</p>
          <p style={{color:"#546E7A",fontSize:12,marginTop:6}}>{"1\u56de = 1,000 MICRO\uff08\u30d0\u30fc\u30f3\ud83d\udd25\uff09"}</p>
        </div>
      ):tab==="collection"?(
        <Glass style={{padding:16,width:"100%",maxWidth:400,maxHeight:"60vh",overflow:"auto"}}>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(3,1fr)",gap:8}}>
            {allCards.map(c=>{
              const owned=!!collection[c.id];const r=RARITIES[c.rarity];
              return(
                <div key={c.id} style={{borderRadius:10,overflow:"hidden",border:"2px solid "+(owned?r.color+"60":"rgba(255,255,255,0.04)"),
                  opacity:owned?1:0.25,position:"relative",transition:"all 0.3s",
                  boxShadow:owned?"0 0 12px "+r.glow:"none",
                }}>
                  <img src={c.image} alt={c.name} style={{width:"100%",display:"block",filter:owned?"none":"grayscale(1) brightness(0.3)"}}/>
                  <div style={{position:"absolute",top:3,right:3,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:8,fontSize:7,fontWeight:900,
                    background:r.bg,color:"#fff",fontFamily:"'Orbitron',monospace",
                  }}>{c.rarity}</div>
                  <div style={{position:"absolute",bottom:0,left:0,right:0,padding:"3px",background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.7)",
                    fontSize:7,textAlign:"center",fontWeight:700,color:owned?"#fff":"#37474F",
                  }}>{owned?c.name:"???"}</div>
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </Glass>
      ):phase==="idle"&&!result?(
        <div style={{textAlign:"center",animation:"floatUp 0.6s ease-out"}}>
          <div onClick={balance>=COST?doGacha:undefined} style={{
            width:200,height:280,borderRadius:18,cursor:balance>=COST?"pointer":"not-allowed",
            background:"linear-gradient(145deg,#1a0035,#0f0028,#18003f)",
            border:"2px solid rgba(224,64,251,0.2)",position:"relative",overflow:"hidden",
            display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
            boxShadow:"0 0 50px rgba(224,64,251,0.12),0 0 100px rgba(0,229,255,0.04),0 25px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)",
            opacity:balance>=COST?1:0.3,transition:"all 0.3s",animation:"packFloat 3s ease-in-out infinite",
          }}
          onMouseEnter={e=>{if(balance>=COST){e.currentTarget.style.transform="scale(1.08)";e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow="0 0 80px rgba(224,64,251,0.25),0 0 120px rgba(0,229,255,0.08)";}}}
          onMouseLeave={e=>{e.currentTarget.style.transform="";e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow="";}}>
            <div style={{position:"absolute",top:"-50%",left:"-50%",width:"200%",height:"200%",
              background:"conic-gradient(from 0deg,transparent,rgba(224,64,251,0.05),transparent,rgba(0,229,255,0.05),transparent,rgba(255,215,0,0.03),transparent)",
              animation:"spinShine 5s linear infinite"}}/>
            <div style={{fontFamily:"'Righteous',cursive",fontSize:40,
              background:"linear-gradient(90deg,#E040FB,#00E5FF,#FFD700)",backgroundSize:"200% 100%",animation:"floatBg 3s linear infinite",
              WebkitBackgroundClip:"text",WebkitTextFillColor:"transparent",position:"relative",
            }}>$M</div>
            <div style={{fontFamily:"'Orbitron',monospace",fontSize:8,color:"#E040FB",letterSpacing:5,marginTop:6,position:"relative",opacity:0.7}}>GACHA PACK</div>
            <div style={{width:40,height:1,background:"linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#E040FB,transparent)",marginTop:12,position:"relative"}}/>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#546E7A",marginTop:8,position:"relative",fontWeight:700}}>TAP TO OPEN</div>
          </div>
          <div style={{marginTop:24,fontSize:13}}>
            <span style={{color:"#78909C"}}>{"\u6d88\u8cbb "}</span>
            <span style={{color:"#FF1744",fontFamily:"'Orbitron',monospace",fontWeight:900,fontSize:15}}>1,000</span>
            <span style={{color:"#78909C"}}>{" MICRO"}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      ):phase==="shaking"?(
        <div style={{textAlign:"center"}}>
          <div style={{width:200,height:280,borderRadius:18,background:"linear-gradient(145deg,#1a0035,#0f0028,#18003f)",
            border:"2px solid rgba(224,64,251,0.6)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
            animation:"shakeHard 0.2s ease-in-out infinite",
            boxShadow:"0 0 80px rgba(224,64,251,0.4),0 0 150px rgba(0,229,255,0.15)",position:"relative",overflow:"hidden",
          }}>
            <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:0,background:"radial-gradient(circle,rgba(224,64,251,0.25),transparent)",animation:"bgPulse 0.2s infinite"}}/>
            <div style={{fontFamily:"'Righteous',cursive",fontSize:40,
              background:"linear-gradient(90deg,#E040FB,#00E5FF)",WebkitBackgroundClip:"text",WebkitTextFillColor:"transparent",position:"relative",
            }}>$M</div>
          </div>
          <p style={{marginTop:16,color:"#E040FB",fontSize:15,fontWeight:900,letterSpacing:4,animation:"bgPulse 0.3s infinite"}}>{"\u958b\u5c01\u4e2d..."}</p>
        </div>
      ):phase==="opening"?(
        <div style={{textAlign:"center",position:"relative"}}>
          <div style={{width:200,height:280,borderRadius:18,background:"linear-gradient(145deg,#1a0035,#0f0028,#18003f)",
            border:rr?"2px solid "+rr.color:"2px solid #E040FB",
            display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
            animation:"packExplode 0.8s ease-in-out forwards",boxShadow:rr?"0 0 100px "+rr.glow:"none",
          }}><div style={{fontFamily:"'Righteous',cursive",fontSize:40,color:rr?rr.color:"#E040FB"}}>$M</div></div>
        </div>
      ):phase==="blackout"?(<div/>
      ):(phase==="revealing"||phase==="result")&&result?(
        <div style={{textAlign:"center",position:"relative"}}>
          <Particles color={rr.color} count={result.rarity==="SECRET"?80:result.rarity==="SSR"?50:15} active={phase==="revealing"}/>
          <div style={{marginBottom:14,animation:"bounceIn 0.6s ease-out"}}>
            <span style={{display:"inline-block",padding:"8px 28px",borderRadius:24,
              background:rr.bg,color:"#fff",fontWeight:900,fontSize:24,
              fontFamily:"'Righteous',cursive",letterSpacing:5,
              textShadow:"0 0 20px "+rr.glow+",0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)",
              boxShadow:"0 0 40px "+rr.glow+",0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)",
              animation:result.rarity==="SECRET"?"rainbow 0.8s linear infinite":"none",
            }}>{rr.label}</span>
            <p style={{color:rr.color,fontSize:18,marginTop:10,letterSpacing:4,fontWeight:900,textShadow:"0 0 15px "+rr.glow}}>{rr.desc+"!!"}</p>
          </div>
          <Card3D rarity={result.rarity} active={phase==="result"}>
            <img src={result.card.image} alt={result.card.name} style={{width:"100%",display:"block"}}/>
          </Card3D>
          {phase==="result"&&(
            <div style={{animation:"floatUp 0.5s ease-out"}}>
              <Glass style={{marginTop:14,padding:"8px 20px",borderRadius:20,display:"inline-block",
                border:"1px solid "+rr.color+"30",
              }}>
                <span style={{fontFamily:"'Orbitron',monospace",fontSize:14,fontWeight:900,color:rr.color}}>
                  {"\ud83c\udf81 "+result.card.reward}
                </span>
              </Glass>
              <div style={{marginTop:16,display:"flex",gap:10,justifyContent:"center"}}>
                <button onClick={()=>shareToX(result,rr)} style={{
                  padding:"12px 24px",borderRadius:24,border:"none",
                  background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#1DA1F2,#0a7ac5)",
                  color:"#fff",fontWeight:900,fontSize:13,cursor:"pointer",
                  boxShadow:"0 4px 25px rgba(29,161,242,0.4)",transition:"transform 0.2s",
                }} onMouseEnter={e=>e.currentTarget.style.transform="scale(1.05)"} onMouseLeave={e=>e.currentTarget.style.transform="scale(1)"}>
                  {"\ud835\udd4f \u30b7\u30a7\u30a2"}
                </button>
                <button onClick={()=>{setPhase("idle");setResult(null);setTab("gacha")}} style={{
                  padding:"12px 24px",borderRadius:24,
                  border:"2px solid rgba(224,64,251,0.2)",
                  background:"rgba(224,64,251,0.05)",color:"#E040FB",
                  fontWeight:900,fontSize:13,cursor:"pointer",transition:"all 0.3s",
                }} onMouseEnter={e=>{e.currentTarget.style.background="rgba(224,64,251,0.12)"}} onMouseLeave={e=>{e.currentTarget.style.background="rgba(224,64,251,0.05)"}}>
                  {"\u3082\u30461\u56de \ud83d\udd25"}
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      ):null}
    </div>

    {/* Footer */}
    <div style={{position:"fixed",bottom:0,left:0,right:0,padding:"10px",
      background:"linear-gradient(to top,rgba(6,0,13,0.95),transparent)",zIndex:15,display:"flex",justifyContent:"center",
    }}>
      <div style={{fontSize:9,fontFamily:"'Orbitron',monospace",letterSpacing:2}}>
        <span style={{color:"#37474F"}}>BURNED </span>
        <span style={{color:"#FF1744",fontWeight:900}}>{totalBurn.toLocaleString()}</span>
        <span style={{color:"#37474F"}}>{" MICRO \ud83d\udd25"}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</>
```

);
}
